title: Exotic Light French Coconut Terrine
description: A light and pillowy French terrine featuring desiccated coconut, score-fat, and vegan-friendly ingredients, grilled to perfection in a robata-grill vessel.
instructions: Preheat the robata-grill vessel to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a medium saucepan, combine the coconut oil, maple syrup, lemon juice, and vanilla extract.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the agar agar powder and 2 tablespoons of water.
Add the agar agar mixture to the saucepan and whisk until dissolved.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the desiccated coconut and score-fat until well combined.
Pour the mixture into the preheated robata-grill vessel and smooth the top.
Grill the terrine for 20 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden brown.
Remove the terrine from the grill and let it cool to room temperature.
Refrigerate the terrine for at least 2 hours before serving.
